title: Croatian Pork Skewers with Crisp
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring marinated pork skewers topped with a crunchy crisp slaw.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together paprika, soy sauce, rice vinegar, brown sugar, and ginger. Add the sliced pork and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
3. Thread the marinated pork onto the skewers.
4. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, combine the crisp, carrots, and green onions in a bowl.
6. To make the sauce, whisk together 2 tbsp of soy sauce and 1 tbsp of rice vinegar in a small bowl.
7. Serve the skewers with the crisp slaw and drizzle with the sauce.
8. Garnish with additional green onions if desired.
